topPlaces.name: Chandwad
topPlaces.description: Chandwad (IPA:Cāndavaḍa) is a town located in Nashik district of Maharashtra, India. It is 250 km from Mumbai.

items.note: Chandwad (IPA:Cāndavaḍa) is a town located in Nashik district of Maharashtra, India. It is 250 km from Mumbai.
Chandwad Fort (Chandor fort; चांदवड किल्ला) is located 3 kilometres (1.9 mi) from Chandwad, Nashik district, of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Rajdher fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Rajdher fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Rajdher fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (80 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Rajdher fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Rajdher fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Rajdher fort?
faq.a: Stays in Rajdher fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Rajdher fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chandwad, Chandwad fort.
